response.justification: Strong match on seniority (13+ years vs. 6+ required) and primary stack expertise. Current role at re:cinq demonstrates AI agent infrastructure work and modern TypeScript/Node.js development. Proven track record across full-stack roles, databases, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and TDD practices. Main gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js and modern testing framework (Vitest, Playwright) mentions, but core architectural and engineering skills are clearly present.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with recent focus on TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI agent infrastructure—directly aligned with primary stack and emerging company priorities
Demonstrated architectural maturity through senior roles at scale (microservices at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec, AWS CDK at Optilyz, Kubernetes deployments at GISCollective)
Strong testing and engineering discipline mindset (TDD explicitly mentioned, taught testing workshops, founded open-source projects with test infrastructure)
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in any role; all backend work appears to use custom solutions or other frameworks, requiring ramp-up on a core stack component
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not listed; while TDD mindset is evident, hands-on expertise with the required tooling is unclear
No explicit mention of authentication, authorization, or security best-practices work, though modern full-stack background suggests familiarity
